headerDisplay:
Kia Connect HomeBridge Plugin — Connects your Kia EV to Apple Home and Siri.

Use your **owners.kia.com** login credentials. Your PIN is the 4-digit PIN set in the Kia Connect app.

**Rate limits (US):** ~30 API calls/day. The default 60-minute poll interval keeps usage within this budget. Reduce it at your own risk.

**12V Battery warning:** Using `refresh: car` (direct car polling) frequently will drain your 12V auxiliary battery. The default uses the cloud cache only.

name.title: Platform Name
name.description: Internal name for this platform instance.

username.title: Kia Connect Username (Email)
username.description: The email address you use to log in at owners.kia.com.

pin.title: Kia Connect PIN
pin.description: Your 4-digit PIN from the Kia Connect app (used to authorise remote commands).

region.title: Region
region.description: The region for your Kia Connect account. This controls which API server is used.

vehicleId.title: Vehicle VIN (optional)
vehicleId.description: VIN of the vehicle to use. If left blank the first vehicle on your account is used. Required if you have multiple vehicles.

pollIntervalMinutes.title: Status Poll Interval (minutes)
pollIntervalMinutes.description: How often to refresh vehicle status from the Kia Connect cloud. US accounts have ~30 API calls/day — keep this at 60 or higher to stay within limits. EU accounts can safely use 30.

climateTemperatureCelsius.title: Remote Climate Target Temperature (°C)
climateTemperatureCelsius.description: The target cabin temperature when remote climate is started (in Celsius). 22°C is a comfortable default.

lowBatteryThreshold.title: Low Battery Alert Threshold (%)
lowBatteryThreshold.description: The state-of-charge percentage below which the battery is considered 'low' and triggers a Home notification.

modelName.title: Vehicle Model Name
modelName.description: Display name for the vehicle model shown in Apple Home (e.g. EV6, EV9, Niro EV).
